tests.title: AUT-1 card is a role=link with href=/browse/AUT-1 and clicking it opens the work-item dialog
Create status button opens modal; Cancel reverts board to original 3-column state
collapse buttons present for every status column, toggle state mutates and reverts
Create button opens inline form with all expected fields; Escape dismisses without persisting
three status columns visible as level-3 headings with count badges when groupBy=status
More actions button opens menu with all expected items for In Progress column
board page loads with title and To Do / In Progress / Done columns
Filter button aria-label is exactly "0 filters applied" in default state
popover renders all expected sections after clicking filter trigger
Group by button shows "Group by Status" and board renders status columns
Popover shows 4 radios with Status checked by default
clicking More actions toolbar button opens menu with Stand-up and Configure columns items
Online-user assignee checkbox is visible in the board toolbar next to Search board
button absent initially, appears after changing Group by, removed after reverting
fill zzznomatch → URL filter, zero counts, empty state; Clear filters → original state
Search board input is present in the board toolbar
open panel shows heading, resize handle and close button; closing removes the panel

tests.title: calendar page loads with active Calendar heading and all sibling tab links visible
search calendar textbox is present and visible in the toolbar
panel exposes heading, helper text, close button, and an unscheduled work item
